feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Service Layer Single Sign On (SSO) example or tutorial
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any tutorial/video/post that explains how to connect to Service Layer with SSO?

I've connect successfully to Service Layer in the past, but can't login when SSO is activated since I always get this error when I try to login into Service Layer via POSTMAN:

 

POST https://localhost:50000/b1s/v1/Login
{
    "CompanyDB": "DEMO_US",
    "Password": "MyPass",
    "UserName": "demo"
}
Error message:
{
    "error": {
        "code": 401,
        "message": {
            "lang": "en-us",
            "value": "Internal error: Get access token error,{\"error\":\"invalid_grant\",\"error_description\":\"Invalid user credentials\"}."
        }
    }
}

 

Additionally, the Service Layer PDF manual is very generic on how to connect via SSO and haven't found solutions in other forums/SAP docs. 

Thanks

entry.title: Getting records from SAP service layer SQLQueries endpoint using conditional parameters
entry.content:
Hi,
we are using SAP service layer and calling the endpoint /SQLQueries('test_contactemployee')/List

we have a following Sql query to get all the contact employees.

SELECT BP."CardCode", BP."CardName", CE."Name", CE."Position", CE."Address", BP."QryGroup1",
CE."Tel1" AS "Phone1", CE."Tel2" AS "Phone2", CE."Cellolar" AS "MobilePhone",
CE."Fax" AS "Fax", CE."E_MailL" AS "EMail",
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "OCRD" BP2 JOIN "OCPR" CE2 ON BP2."CardCode" = CE2."CardCode") AS "@odata.count"
FROM "OCRD" BP
JOIN "OCPR" CE ON BP."CardCode" = CE."CardCode"
where BP."CardCode" = :CardCode


What we want to achieve is that if :CardCode is null then retrieve all records otherwise particular BP. And same goes for other parameters. What are the possibilities?

WHERE (:CardCode IS NULL OR BP."CardCode" = :CardCode)

entry.title: On server restart, Add-On not working
entry.content:
On server restart, Add-On not working

Service "B1ServerToolsAuthentication" shown Running

After restarting this service, Add-On issue resolves.

Why this so ?

entry.title: Enter end date. [Service Contracts - End Date] SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

When creating a delivery note then I am facing error like Enter end date. [Service Contracts - End Date]

I have checked into Service Contract and mentioned END date which is the last date of Financial year but remain same issue.

Item is managed by the series number and serial number Expiration Date and Mfr Warranty End is less then above last date of Financial year but issue remain same.

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: SEVT TABLE DELETING OLD DATA
entry.content: The SAP B1 SEVT table that stores events via b1if, started to delete all data automatically, and I have no idea how this happened, it receives the event, it appears in the database, and after a few seconds it disappears from the database, has anyone seen this?

entry.title: Deleted Payment Draft Change Log
entry.content:
Hi All

Please help confirm there is no way to trace who and when Payment Drafts or other Documents Drafts are Deleted right?

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Before created AP Invoice , Sale was made then Impact of G/L account SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Need to understanding on G/L account, Stock account, Stock while sale was made before making actual AP Invoice.

Issue : One GRPO is created and Few delivery is created here based on GRPO.  

Here, AP Invoice is not created for that GRPO. Need to understanding the effect of G/L account, Stock account, Stock.

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: I can't update the closedate field with dtw
entry.content: I want to update the "startdate" and "closedate" fields in production orders with dtw. I get the error "Field cannot be updated (ODBC -1029)65171" when updating the end date field. How can I update this field?

entry.title: B1iF - Update UDF's not working
entry.content:
I have create a really simple step in the Integrations Framework, which should update two UDF's in a purchase order in company B, if the fields were updateded in a purchase order in company A.

This is the Payload and the result of B1 Object:

<vpf:Payload xmlns:vpf="urn:com.sap.b1i.vplatform:entity" Role="X" id="atom5" ts="2024/08/22 08:28:15">

<OPOR xmlns="">
<row>
<DocEntry>54991</DocEntry>
</row>
</OPOR>
<POR1 xmlns="">
<row>
<LineNum>2</LineNum>
<ItemCode>635101</ItemCode>
<U_isPruefLos>Y</U_isPruefLos>
<U_Labprue>N</U_Labprue>
</row>
<row>
<LineNum>3</LineNum>
<ItemCode>635102</ItemCode>
<U_isPruefLos>Y</U_isPruefLos>
<U_Labprue>Y</U_Labprue>
</row>
<row>
<LineNum>4</LineNum>
<ItemCode>635103</ItemCode>
<U_isPruefLos>Y</U_isPruefLos>
<U_Labprue>N</U_Labprue>
</row>
<row>
<LineNum>5</LineNum>
<ItemCode>635104</ItemCode>
<U_isPruefLos>Y</U_isPruefLos>
<U_Labprue>N</U_Labprue>
</row>
</POR1>
</vpf:Payload>
<Payload Role="C" id="atom4" system="0010000250" status="success" b1login="Technical User" method="Synchronous Update" objectid="22" payload="atom5" keyname="DocEntry" keyvalue="54991" DIresult="success" DImsg=""/>

If does not work correct. It updates the pruchase order in company A, but change no value, as you can see in the change log of the document:

Is something missing in the payload to update a purchase order? Any suggestions why the fields are not updated?

 

Regards

Marco

entry.title: I can't update the duedate and startdate fields with dtw
entry.content: Hİ, I can't update the duedate and startdate fields with dtw in production orders. I get the error "Start date must be later than, or the same as, the document start date [WOR4.StartDate][line: 1]65171" regarding the startdate field. but the date I entered is already later than the start date field. When I enter a previous date, there is no problem. Can you help?

entry.title: The Payment Wizard was not executed [Message 3657-5] SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

When executing a payment wizard then facing error like The Payment Wizard was not executed [Message 3657-5]

I have assigned payment method , relevant GL account to business partner and payment method but remain same issue.

Issue : The Payment Wizard was not executed [Message 3657-5]

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Import into SAP from Excel
entry.content:
i All

Please can you help - I am trying to import some BP data using the option in the menu Administration - Data Import/Export - Data Import from Excel.

I have created my import file as a text file and provided the relevant mappings. Having located my text file, I then get the following error message:

Invalid Business Partner Bank record - Row Number 1

The text file only contains three columns which I have mapped to BP Code, BP Name and Foreign Name.

Can anyone assist please.

entry.title: Selecting fields from ProductTreeLines inside a ProductTree query with Service Layer API
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm just starting to work with Service Layer, and I found myself with a requirement to filter the fields returned by the Service Layer API.

In this case, we are querying the ProductTrees endpoint, which respond also with the ProductTreeLines.

But we don't want all the ProductTreeLines fields to be responded by the server, we want a subset only.

I know how to select the fields we want from the main entity (ProductTree) using the $select query param, but I'm strugling to select specific fields from the child object (ProductTreeLine).

Is there a way to do this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAP B1 Webclient: We are getting an error when trying to preview a report
entry.content:
Hi all,

We get the following error when trying to preview a layout in the weblient:

The layouts can be previewed without problem in SAP B1. 

Does anyone know how to fix this?

Best regards,

Kim

entry.title: SAP B1 - Sales Order text line interface back to Delivery Note
entry.content:
Hi,

I have an solutions that integrate with my Sales Order, but when the solutions integrate back to create the Delivery Note that reference to my particular Sales Order, all the Predefined text is gone.

Any advise? logically when interface back to SAP B1 Delivery Note by reference back to SO , shouldn't it takes all details of the SO to be populated to  Delivery Note

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Data Removal
entry.content: How can we easily remove data from one Business Partner field in a large number of records.

entry.title: Trans. Type column use into Receipt from Production SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Need to understanding the Trans. Type column data (Complete, Reject) into receipt from production screen.

If I have used both options but in both time, Stock quantity will increase after creating the receipt from production screen. 

Issue : Use of Complete / Reject column 

#Production Order, #receipt from production

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: how to update startdate and duedate fields in production order
entry.content: How do I update the startdate and duedate fields in the production order? Which templates should I use and how should I fill them out?

entry.title: how to see quantity per warehouse in list of items
entry.content:
Dear all,

In SAP B1 when creating a sales order, we have a row called 'In Stock'. But certain items we have in 2 different warehouses. How can I see change the view of this list, so I can see:

- Total stock

- Stock WHS 1

- Stock WHS 2 etc, etc,

I hope you can help me.

Regards, Mark

entry.title: Unable to add User for Logging into the Authentication Service in SAP B1 10.0 FP2402 MSSQL Version
entry.content:
Hi  Team,

Unable to add User for Logging into the Authentication Service in SAP B1 10.0 FP2402 MSSQL Version.

I have tried using this link: Adding a User for Logging into the Authentication Service | SAP Help Portal

Please help me to resolve.

Regards,

Surya
